items.h: Additional Details On Decision To Have Kenny Omega Win AEW Title From MJF On Dynamite
items.p: Kenny Omega won the AEW Men's World Championship for the second time when he defeated MJF on AEW "Dynamite: Beach Break".

items.h: AEW Full Gear announced for Phoenix, Arizona on November 14

items.h: AEW Full Gear To Be Held At Mortgage Matchup Center In Phoenix, AZ
items.p: AEW Full Gear is headed to Arizona. All Elite Wrestling announced that AEW Full Gear will take place on Saturday, November 14 at Mortgage Matchup Center in Phoenix, AZ. AEW Full Gear is coming to...

items.h: AEW reveals Full Gear 2026 date and location
items.p: Another piece of AEW’s 2026 pay-per-view schedule has been revealed with the promotion heading west for Full Gear. Full Gear 2026 will be held in Phoenix, Arizona at the Mortgage Matchup Center on...

items.h: Bully Ray Reacts To MJF Losing Out On AEW All In Main Event
items.p: WWE legend Bully Ray has questioned AEW's decision to have MJF drop the world title to Kenny Omega and analyzed the possible reason behind it.

items.h: Former WWE Star Chris Masters Almost Worked With Steven Spielberg
items.p: Ex-WWE star Chris Masters has opened up about how he turned down a potential appearance in a Steven Spielberg film that featured several AEW stars.

items.h: Will Ospreay discusses special AEW All In entrance plans and Wembley Stadium main event
items.p: Will Ospreay opened up about his journey to becoming a popular name in wrestling, his upcoming AEW World Championship opportunity, and why fans shouldn’t expect an Assassin’s Creed-inspired...

items.h: AEW's MVP Was Initially Hesitant To Accept Bad Bunny
items.p: Former WWE star MVP was initially skeptical about accepting Bad Bunny as a wrestler, but his opinion quickly changed after watching his debut match.

items.h: Matt Hardy Shares Thoughts On Sheamus' Time In WWE, Prospects In AEW
items.p: Matt Hardy has shared his thoughts on Sheamus' surprising WWE exit and where the Irish star could land next, discussing several potential destinations.

items.h: AEW Dynamite preview: The latest card for Wednesday’s show
items.p: By Jason Powell, ProWrestling.net Editor... The post AEW Dynamite preview: The latest card for Wednesday’s show appeared first on Pro Wrestling Dot Net.

items.h: Jim Ross Says He Wishes WWE Champion CM Punk Was Still In AEW: 'He's A Good Friend'
items.p: AEW commentator Jim Ross is full of praise for WWE Champion CM Punk, explaining what he loves about him and why he wishes he were still in AEW.

items.h: AJ Styles explains why he doesn’t see Kenny Omega joining WWE
items.p: AJ Styles shared insights on Kenny Omega potentially signing with WWE someday. Styles cited that he does not envision Omega leaving AEW and being a part of WWE on the Phenomenally Retro Podcast....
